downloadsBandToolbarAria: Quick actions on the downloads tab
downloadsEmptyFilter: No rows match this filter. Change the status chips above or add new URLs.
downloadsEmptyQueue: Queue is empty. Add URLs in the field above.
downloadsHistoryEmpty: No entries yet. Finished queue rows will appear here as they complete.
downloadsHistoryOpenHandlerPreparing: Preparing file for the editor… a WebM preview may be created if needed.
downloadsHistoryRepeatQueued: URL from history added to the queue
downloadsLogEmpty: The log will appear after you start a yt-dlp queue row.
downloadsLowerStackAria: Log and history under the queue
downloadsOverviewStatsHint: Live queue row counts: total, running, done, errors, and pending.
downloadsPageHint: This tab is the main yt-dlp desk (queue in the center, log and history under the table, settings on the right like v0; below ~1100px width settings move to the bottom and collapse like history and log — scroll the whole tab). Pop-out is a second window with the same IPC and the full token reference list.
downloadsPageIntroBandAria: Downloads tab title and quick actions
downloadsQueueOpenDownloadDirTitle: Open yt-dlp download folder (destination from settings; works before the download finishes)
downloadsQueuePauseUnsupportedOsTitle: Pausing yt-dlp is not available on Windows (OS-level SIGSTOP/SIGCONT).
downloadsQueuePauseWaitingProcessTitle: Pause becomes available once the yt-dlp process has started
downloadsStandalonePageHint: A separate window with the same queue, log, and yt-dlp settings as the Downloads tab in the main window. Changes stay in sync through the main process.
downloadsStandaloneThemeToggleTitle: Toggle theme (in sync with the main window)
downloadsStopQueueTooltip: Stops only the current yt-dlp process. The URL queue is kept; start a row again with the triangle.
downloadsUrlActionsToolbarAria: Actions for the URL field and download queue
downloadsUrlAria: URLs to append to the download queue
downloadsUrlEnqueueHint: Paste multiple URLs, one per line. Use the buttons to the right of the field to enqueue.
downloadsUrlPlaceholder: One URL per line, or multiple URLs
downloadsWorkbenchAria: Downloads tab: queue, log, and yt-dlp settings rail
